description: Ships into the instance repo (copied from instance-template/) and keeps third-party-shaped pins current: the OCI Helm charts (independently versioned) and external GitHub Action digests. The first-party lke-landing-zone references — the git::-tagged Terraform modules (?ref=vX.Y.Z), the reusable-workflow uses:@ refs, and template-ref: — are NOT Renovate-managed: they are rendered in lockstep from the copier llz_version that `llz new`/`llz upgrade` set to the llz binary's own version, so `llz upgrade` (not Renovate) bumps them as a unit (see the disable rule below). ADOPTERS: after forking, repoint the packageName/registryUrls below from <@ upstream_org @> to your own fork/registry, exactly as you repoint the module sources themselves.

customManagers.description: Versions carrying an explicit `# renovate: datasource=… depName=…` annotation (e.g. apl_chart_version in tfvars, image tags in values, the reusable-workflow template-ref in a workflow stub). Accepts both HCL `name = "v"` and YAML `key: v` (quoted or bare).

packageRules.description: The first-party lke-landing-zone self-reference (reusable-workflow uses:@ + template-ref:) is rendered from the copier llz_version and re-pinned by `llz upgrade`, not Renovate — disable it so the two never race. Modules pin to a bare ?ref=vX.Y.Z with no custom manager, so they are already unmanaged. Charts (llz-*/charts/llz-*) are independently versioned and stay Renovate-managed below.
Group first-party LLZ chart bumps into one PR per release wave
First-party LLZ charts are immutable releases we cut ourselves — safe to automerge patch bumps
GitHub Actions and reusable-workflow refs: pin to digests, group together
